# Route Strategy Curated Baseline v1

This directory contains the checked-in baseline assets for the current `M6`
read-only route-strategy evidence workflow.

Contents:
- `route-strategy-batch-requests.json`
- `route-strategy-batch-result.json`
- four deterministic native fixture projects used by that manifest

The baseline is generated by:

```bash
cargo run -q -p eda-cli -- --format json project capture-route-strategy-curated-baseline --out-dir crates/test-harness/testdata/quality/route_strategy_curated_baseline_v1
```

Normal verification and CI usage is:

```bash
python3 scripts/check_route_strategy_evidence.py
```

That script validates the checked-in baseline artifact, regenerates a fresh
curated run in a temporary directory, compares it to the checked-in baseline,
and gates the result with `strict_identical`.

The checked-in native fixture projects in this directory are also part of the
repo-native structural validation gate:

```bash
python3 scripts/check_native_project_fixtures.py
```

That workflow runs `project validate` over the checked-in fixture roots listed
in `crates/test-harness/testdata/quality/native_project_validation_manifest_v1.json`.
Three fixtures are expected-valid native projects; `no-proposal-null-net-class`
is intentionally expected-invalid to preserve the route-strategy no-proposal
evidence case driven by `net.class = null`.
